title: apium bicknellii
intro: Apium bicknellii, also known as Bicknell's waterparsnip, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Apium bicknellii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Apium bicknellii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
